ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_no" TEXT /* Course number (e.g., COMSE6998) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., TOPICS IN COMPUTER SCIENCE) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic department offering the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course (e.g., COMSE6998, COMSW4111) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the course */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the section belongs to */,
  "section_no" TEXT /* Section number (e.g., 010, 006) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the section is offered */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the section is offered (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the section */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the section */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the section */,
  "location" TEXT /* Room or location where the section is held */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days of the week the section meets (e.g., MWF) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the section is online */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the section was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the section was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Computer Science) */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the department office */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course section */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the section */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., enrolled, waitlisted, dropped) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)
